ogTitle: Tam O'Shanter vs Tamaree: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tam O'Shanter and Tamaree.
heading: Tam O'Shanter vs Tamaree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tam O'Shanter, Queensland and Tamaree, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tam O'Shanter has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Tamaree (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tam O'Shanter or Tamaree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tam O'Shanter has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Tamaree scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tam O'Shanter scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Tamaree scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tam O'Shanter or Tamaree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tam O'Shanter has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
